assertions.reason: Quote behavior is preserved in pre-submit state: entering 10 USD1 populated receive quote (~1,123.865884 CASH), displayed USD equivalents, and kept CTA in safe disconnected state (Connect Wallet). No irreversible on-chain action executed.
Wallet modal opens and shows Aptos wallet choices, but full connection could not be completed in isolated headless session because no wallet extension/credentials were available.

WebSocket real-time validation is blocked by infrastructure: repeated connection failures to ws://localhost:3101 (ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED) with additional API 429 noise. Retried via page reload; failures persisted.

Chart update verification is blocked by unstable data plane during run (intermittent chart error state and heavy API 429 responses). Candle fetches were observed, but live-update correctness could not be confirmed under these conditions.

Balance display with connected wallet could not be validated because wallet connection could not be completed in isolated headless session (no installed Aptos wallet/credentials). Disconnected-state visibility is preserved (no balance text shown, Connect Wallet visible).

frictions.description: Frequent API rate-limit responses (429) during normal page polling created noisy console output and intermittent UI degradation during validation.
frictions.resolution: Spaced interactions and retried with one page reload only.

frictions.description: WebSocket endpoint ws://localhost:3101 consistently refused connections in this run.
frictions.resolution: Retried non-disruptively by reload; did not restart shared services per mission constraints.

blockers.description: Realtime backend channel unavailable: ws://localhost:3101 returned ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED on retry.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded the app and re-checked console/network; failures persisted.

blockers.description: No wallet extension/credentials available in isolated headless environment to complete an Aptos wallet connection.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal and checked available providers/install links; connection not possible without external wallet/account.
